description: Sedition and riot Are breaking the quiet Of Germanys cities of late The workers arent heeding Von Hindenbergs pleading To suffer in patience and wait With German dissension At home not to mention The howls of the Austrian mob Which make things unpleasant We wouldnt at present Care much for Von Hindenbergs job The Captains of Uboats Have sunk very few boats Which carry munitions or troops But theyve brought to grief ships Like Belgian relief ships And hospital shipsin large groups INTOXICATED WITH NEW FREEDOM Grave as is the situation in Russia Americans can not keep their faces straight when they read of the mass meeting of thieves held at Rostoff on the Don to demand a share in the new freedom and a chance to turn over anew leaf The thieves have the idea not uncommon in these times that the government can do everything for the individual A hit of resolution to lead an upright life hereafter would appear to be the most effective remedy but the thieves are evidently looking for a big helping hand from the new government Perhaps they desire a bonus of a few thousand rublos to putthem on their feet tho with
